semanticHomePolicy.definition: Folder token and local folder context may contribute Semantic Home evidence.
semanticHomePolicy.derivationMeaning: May support Semantic Home derivation when combined with lineage and other bounded evidence.
semanticHomePolicy.guardrails: Evidence only; not final placement truth and not Naming ownership.

semanticHomePolicy.definition: Parent chain context may contribute nested semantic interpretation evidence.
semanticHomePolicy.derivationMeaning: May support Semantic Home derivation only when parent lineage context remains coherent with nearby structure.
semanticHomePolicy.guardrails: Evidence only; not final placement truth and not Structural Home identity by itself.

semanticHomePolicy.definition: Naming bridge outputs may contribute semantic-name or semantic-family evidence.
semanticHomePolicy.derivationMeaning: May support Semantic Home derivation only through bounded bridge interpretation inside Tree-owned advisory reasoning.
semanticHomePolicy.guardrails: Naming retains ownership of semantic-name and semantic-family interpretation; this lane consumes bounded evidence only.

semanticHomePolicy.definition: Structural Home context may contribute boundary evidence around candidate semantic interpretation.
semanticHomePolicy.derivationMeaning: May constrain or contextualize Semantic Home derivation without becoming Semantic Home truth by itself.
semanticHomePolicy.guardrails: Structural Home identity remains separately owned and must not be replaced by Semantic Home guidance.

semanticHomePolicy.definition: Structural-home signal policy outputs may provide weak or contextual boundary evidence.
semanticHomePolicy.derivationMeaning: Must remain bounded as supporting evidence and must not become standalone Semantic Home truth.
semanticHomePolicy.guardrails: Does not replace structural-home signal policy registry ownership and remains evidence only.

semanticHomePolicy.definition: Known-root compatibility context may provide boundary checks for semantic interpretation.
semanticHomePolicy.derivationMeaning: May gate or contextualize interpretation but must not become canonical Semantic Home truth.
semanticHomePolicy.guardrails: Known-root compatibility ownership remains in the known-roots registry as current runtime truth.
